title: Surgeon Vacancy at Johnson & Johnson India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Johnson & Johnson India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Johnson & Johnson India has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Jaipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Johnson & Johnson India:
Johnson & Johnson India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Johnson & Johnson India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
